title: eschscholzia californica var. crocea
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. crocea, also known as the California poppy, is a variety of the California poppy plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Eschscholzia californica var. crocea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Eschscholzia californica var. crocea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
